name: Supplementation review reinforces heterogeneity and individualized-context boundary
summary: Review of 32 human studies on nutritional compounds for healthy aging, noting potential benefits for antioxidants, glycine/NAC, and NAD precursors but heterogeneity across formulations, populations, dosing, and biomarkers.
statement: Review of 32 human studies on nutritional compounds for healthy aging, noting potential benefits for antioxidants, glycine/NAC, and NAD precursors but heterogeneity across formulations, populations, dosing, and biomarkers.
population_or_model: Review-level synthesis across NAD, redox, supplementation, or vascular-aging literature
caveats: Review context should not be treated as new primary efficacy evidence.
The record supports boundary and source-completeness assessment rather than stage upgrade.
